Events & Activations

The Perfumers

The creation of your story scent.

2023
Sector Fragrance & Retail
Region UAE
Year 2023
Type 360 Campaign

A UAE-wide contest campaign that invited perfume enthusiasts to become “perfumers” by mixing and naming their own custom scent using a guided mixing kit—supported by retail VM/installations, a landing page, and multiple campaign videos.

The Challenge

Build a campaign that doesn’t just advertise perfume—but gets people to create perfume. Make the mixing process accessible and engaging enough to trigger UGC while maintaining momentum through contest cycles and evaluations.

The Insight

Gen Z and younger audiences desire self-expression and social proof. A guided "lab" kit makes the complex craft of perfumery approachable, bridging luxury with maker culture.

The Big Idea

Blending as Storytelling Invite customers to unleash their creativity and become the masterminds behind their own scent creation. Participants blend, name, and share their signature scent.

Outcomes & Strategic Value

The campaign reached
over 600+ participants.

The campaign was created to engage perfume enthusiasts and people who love perfume mixing by involving them in the process of creating a perfume. It generated significant UGC and platform virality across the UAE.

→

600+ active participants successfully mixed their own unique scents.

→

UGC + virality achieved on TikTok and Instagram through #BlendwithLOVE.

→

Integrated execution spanning retail VM, physical kits, and digital endpoints.

→

Strong example of transforming a brand truth into a participatory 360 platform.

"Not just advertising perfume—
getting people to create it."

360 Campaign · UAE · 3 Months

RIMA ALSHOUFI
